textByHash.252954fcbb2d389bdac519c13b8cc0290742e592: Chieftain Brundt! I'm here on behalf of the Fremennik Council! We've heard some disturbing news about a basilisk in town.
textByHash.49008e9571d2b28b0fcd2570636741eaa94e76af: When will you see that this outerlander is the cause of all of our problems!
textByHash.ec21461b2355c12423a118432e6b8288491e3f60: You can disguise it all you want, but he is an outerlander and always will be! Ever since we let him in, we've had nothing but trouble!
textByHash.3ed7422ac9782b9f0cc8d26f220c7c244f6c239c: And to top it all off, now we have basilisks wandering our town. The council have had enough!
textByHash.1694669ca3bebe072f11ac16379eb5c88a39223c: I have a declaration here signed by seven of our twelve council members. We declare this outerlander an exile!
textByHash.a9608b7c9992369de4ddaa49b508ffb5336f7f00: Do not use that name! The decision of the council is final. As Chieftain, you are honour bound to enact it.
textByHash.8553abd0a94812c7fce922977dd450f070a1dbb7: You have truly proven yourself to be one of us! I'm sorry we ever doubted you.
textByHash.642ab798ca4a851bbc9ddd6078fa7bd081050230: I cannot speak to you outerlander! Talk to Brundt, the Chieftain!
textByHash.434477ddce2f1fdd7b937f95b17e288e0c0220a1: You stay away from me outerlander!
textByHash.50dbab40dec156efa590287269ee422f2c2af477: Hello again brother . What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!
textByHash.34716da1ba9c76b7a9be866b1aa8b0287f12e461: Hello again sister . What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!
textByHash.d92a3f4d7880888f8eb005dc0f335acfcadbc712: My door is always open should you ever need my help .
textByHash.4a050e4312ddd0c65809c753d23c22a42fc8deb3: ... It has been too long since last we met!
textByHash.4f7b5f3daf704131a48d147e07c4209f32d2501d: Welcome back brother . It is always a pleasure to see you here!
textByHash.c16ae5b9c9b6bff475c46794fd781f9395226c35: Welcome back sister . It is always a pleasure to see you here!
textByHash.aae1cab00a8b486ff5d04cfdbe79c0be4ee852b3: My apologies brother ! I have not time to tarry here with you!
textByHash.a7feb7f2335cd59f6fd92eef78d18adcccb68e30: My apologies sister ! I have not time to tarry here with you!
textByHash.226f235c64667b63dafd3ed2566b036c3d1bc4b2: How are you ? I hope all fares well with you this day!
textByHash.962cc6e9c1a5b2f9c630de230f3f09b05474dc32: All is well with me also!
textByHash.e063db0a81ff9f70a2fc5c4f4c43172dede5cbfd: Always good to see you brother .
textByHash.90014ff29f06300f55ff11ce67db1ce9bec9737f: Always good to see you sister .
textByHash.0531dffe04126fbc16eeb03493a35fd49da5d339: How can you steal from me?
textByHash.4bbe37f03bbad85b0906d96f16610015fd0e3894: Why would you try to steal from me?
